title: CBB Rulebook Volume 1 Operational Risk Management Module OM-2A Cloud Outsourcing Arrangements
summary: Requires licensees to manage data protection, information security, confidentiality, data-location, and foreign authority access risks when customer or licensee data is hosted or processed through cloud service providers.

theme_notes.data_privacy.crossborder_data_flows: Regulates material cloud outsourcing by CBB licensees.

notes: Related instruments: CBB OM-2 Outsourcing Requirements and Appendix OM-2 Cloud Outsourcing Control Guidelines
